channel.title: Asides on Deuts Log
channel.description: Recent content in Asides on Deuts Log

item.title: Paperless Starfruit — AI-Powered Document Processing for Paperless-ngx
item.description:
Paperless Starfruit — AI-Powered Document Processing for Paperless-ngx

AI-powered document processing companion for Paperless-ngx. Adds LLM-powered summarization, tagging, and categorization with configurable LLM and OCR providers. Docker-ready, TypeScript, 26 stars.
item.content:encoded:
Paperless Starfruit — AI-Powered Document Processing for Paperless-ngx

AI-powered document processing companion for Paperless-ngx. Adds LLM-powered summarization, tagging, and categorization with configurable LLM and OCR providers. Docker-ready, TypeScript, 26 stars.

item.title: Minimamemosa — Lightweight Self-Hosted Memo App
item.description:
Minimamemosa — Lightweight Self-Hosted Memo App

A lightweight, self-hosted memo/notes app built in Rust. Minimal resource usage (5–10MB idle RAM, max 100MB). Uses SQLite, HTMX, Docker-ready. MIT licensed, 4 stars.
item.content:encoded:
Minimamemosa — Lightweight Self-Hosted Memo App

A lightweight, self-hosted memo/notes app built in Rust. Minimal resource usage (5–10MB idle RAM, max 100MB). Uses SQLite, HTMX, Docker-ready. MIT licensed, 4 stars.

item.title: Kosh — Privacy-First Self-Hosted Personal Finance App
item.description:
Kosh — Privacy-First Self-Hosted Personal Finance App

Self-hosted personal finance app for accounts, transactions, budgets, bills, recurring commitments, goals, and CSV imports. Built with Next.js + PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM. Exact integer money math, optional AI via Gemini, read-only MCP access. AGPL-3.0, 12 stars.
item.content:encoded:
Kosh — Privacy-First Self-Hosted Personal Finance App

Self-hosted personal finance app for accounts, transactions, budgets, bills, recurring commitments, goals, and CSV imports. Built with Next.js + PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM. Exact integer money math, optional AI via Gemini, read-only MCP access. AGPL-3.0, 12 stars.

item.title: Prefab Foldable Houses Philippines — Smarthouse Philippines Tour & Pricing
item.description:
Prefab Foldable Houses Philippines — Smarthouse Philippines Tour & Pricing

Best Finds Tv tours Smart House Philippines (Quezon City) showcasing foldable prefab houses. One-day installation, up to 3 floors, prices start at ₱1.3M for a fully furnished foldable unit. Also covers low-cost and luxury prefab options with 50-year durability, soundproofing, and 7.2 magnitude earthquake resistance.
item.content:encoded:
Prefab Foldable Houses Philippines — Smarthouse Philippines Tour & Pricing

Best Finds Tv tours Smart House Philippines (Quezon City) showcasing foldable prefab houses. One-day installation, up to 3 floors, prices start at ₱1.3M for a fully furnished foldable unit. Also covers low-cost and luxury prefab options with 50-year durability, soundproofing, and 7.2 magnitude earthquake resistance.

item.title: Tela
item.description:
Tela

Open-source, self-hostable markdown team wiki with a built-in MCP server — so AI agents read, write, and search your docs as first-class teammates. Live multiplayer, semantic + full-text search. Go + PostgreSQL + React/Milkdown.
item.content:encoded:
Tela

Open-source, self-hostable markdown team wiki with a built-in MCP server — so AI agents read, write, and search your docs as first-class teammates. Live multiplayer, semantic + full-text search. Go + PostgreSQL + React/Milkdown.

item.title: Dufs
item.description:
Dufs

A file server that supports static serving, uploading, searching, accessing control, webdav.
item.content:encoded:
Dufs

A file server that supports static serving, uploading, searching, accessing control, webdav.

item.title: Folder Host
item.description:
Folder Host

Your own private cloud in one executable. Share files, collaborate on code, and manage users without complex setup. - MertJSX/folderhost
item.content:encoded:
Folder Host

Your own private cloud in one executable. Share files, collaborate on code, and manage users without complex setup. - MertJSX/folderhost

item.title: Alarik Object Storage
item.description:
Alarik Object Storage

High performance S3 compatible object storage focused on speed and simplicity and designed to be an open alternative to MinIO and RustFS.
item.content:encoded:
Alarik Object Storage

High performance S3 compatible object storage focused on speed and simplicity and designed to be an open alternative to MinIO and RustFS.

item.title: OvertChat
item.description:
OvertChat

A simpler self-hosted alternative to Open WebUI. Bring your own API keys or local models. Native Android client in closed beta.
item.content:encoded:
OvertChat

A simpler self-hosted alternative to Open WebUI. Bring your own API keys or local models. Native Android client in closed beta.

item.title: Mailflow
item.description:
Mailflow

A self-hosted, unified webmail client.
item.content:encoded:
Mailflow

A self-hosted, unified webmail client.
